title: stelis brachiata
intro: Stelis brachiata, a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also applied topically in the form of ointments and creams.
